sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UInt32, uuid UUID) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_uuids VALUES (1, generateUUIDv7()), (2, generateUUIDv7());
SELECT id, uuid, generateUUIDv7() AS new_uuid FROM test_uuids;
UPDATE test_uuids SET uuid = generateUUIDv7() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT count(*) AS count_of_uuids FROM test_uuids WHERE uuid = generateUUIDv7();
